ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or file path to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, healthcare professional, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wearable_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "last_connected_date" TEXT /* Date and time the device was last connected to the platform */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wearable_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "calorie_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the activity */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the activity */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors climbed during the activity */,
  "minutes_sedentary" INTEGER /* Minutes spent in a sedentary state */,
  "minutes_lightly_active" INTEGER /* Minutes spent in a lightly active state */,
  "minutes_fairly_active" INTEGER /* Minutes spent in a fairly active state */,
  "minutes_very_active" INTEGER /* Minutes spent in a very active state */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "steps_goal" INTEGER /* User's daily steps goal */,
  "calories_goal" INTEGER /* User's daily calories burned goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_data" (
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who slept */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sleep */,
  "minutes_of_sleep" INTEGER /* Minutes spent sleeping */,
  "minutes_of_being_awake" INTEGER /* Minutes spent being awake */,
  "number_of_awakings" INTEGER /* Number of times the user woke up during sleep */,
  "length_of_rest_in_minutes" INTEGER /* Total length of rest in minutes */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Quality of sleep (e.g., poor, fair, good, excellent) */,
  "deep_sleep_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of deep sleep */,
  "light_sleep_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of light sleep */,
  "rem_sleep_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of REM sleep */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sleep record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sleep record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sleep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of plan (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain, endurance) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or admin who created the plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fitness plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fitness plan was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_plans_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the workout */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the workout */,
  "workout_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout */,
  "workout_description" TEXT /* Description of the workout */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the workout in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the workout */,
  "workout_type" TEXT /* Type of workout (e.g., strength, cardio, flexibility) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the workout record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the workout record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made progress */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the progress */,
  "progress_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to track progress (e.g., weight, body fat percentage) */,
  "progress_value" REAL /* Value of the progress metric */,
  "goal_value" REAL /* Target value for the progress metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the progress record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the progress record was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the progress record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the reminder */,
  "reminder_name" TEXT /* Name of the reminder */,
  "reminder_description" TEXT /* Description of the reminder */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., active, dismissed, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date of the share */,
  "share_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for sharing (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "share_text" TEXT /* Text shared by the user */,
  "platform_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the user on the social platform */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the post on the social platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the share record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the share record was last updated */,
  "engagement" TEXT /* Engagement metrics (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the admin user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the admin user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the admin user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the admin user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the admin user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the admin user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., super admin, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
